inputs.label: Metric Tons per Unit
inputs.businessContext: Mass of a single unit in metric tons

inputs.label: Number of Units
inputs.businessContext: Total number of items, containers, or batches

inputs.label: Waste Factor
inputs.businessContext: Additional percentage for waste, safety, or overage

inputs.label: Decimal Precision
inputs.businessContext: Number of decimal places to round the primary output

formulas.pounds_rounded: Math.round(metric_tons * number_of_units * (1 + waste_factor / 100) * conversion_factor * Math.pow(10, precision)) / Math.pow(10, precision)
